host.kernel_cmdline: BOOT_IMAGE=/boot/vmlinuz-6.15.11-061511-generic root=UUID=85355174-a2ad-4e84-bf78-53fac30b89fb ro panic=10 panic_on_oops=1 softlockup_panic=1 hung_task_panic=1 splash quiet iommu=pt vt.handoff=7

benchmarks.name: simple
benchmarks.hypothesis: Captures the staged harness floor for baseline subtraction

benchmarks.name: binary_search
benchmarks.hypothesis: Branch-heavy search should reward stronger branch-oriented code generation

benchmarks.name: bitcount
benchmarks.description: Kernighan popcount over generated u64 input
benchmarks.hypothesis: Favors stronger scalar optimization and loop code generation

benchmarks.name: load_byte_recompose
benchmarks.description: Recompose 128 staged u64 values from individual byte loads
benchmarks.hypothesis: Kernel byte-load lowering should add measurable exec cost versus equivalent native u64 loads

benchmarks.name: switch_dispatch
benchmarks.description: Dense switch dispatch over generated 6-bit values
benchmarks.hypothesis: Dense dispatch should reflect jump-table or compare-ladder lowering quality

benchmarks.name: mega_basic_block_2048
benchmarks.description: Single very large acyclic straight-line block with many live temporaries
benchmarks.hypothesis: A huge basic block should directly stress scheduling and register allocation scalability
